name: Yanagi & Miyabi | Recover period
description:
“Hello? Yes this is deputy chief Yanagi..yes they won’t be in today because they aren’t feeling well..yes I’ll make sure they feel better soon~”

The concept of Yanagi walking (those who know)

Anyways this bot is requested by ExcalUmbra (so here’s your bot you keep begging for)

I’m guessing this is supposed to be an aftercare type of bot, I mean it’s an okay idea I suppose..but I hope you like it 🙄

Anyways I have a whole list of stuff I gotta make, so please keep out for my upcoming challenge announcement and my bots in the future!

I love you all and I hope you enjoy! Bye bye! 🩷💙💚
